person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.x APIs; failing to update causes dependency resolution conflicts and missing classes at compile/runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler and runtime must be configured for Java 21 to utilize new features and ensure compatibility with the target environment.
